name: YTLite
subtitle: Lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+
description: A lightweight YouTube client with SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, and up to 1080p playback. No ads, no tracking, no dependencies.

apps.name: YTLite
apps.subtitle: YouTube client for iOS 12+

versions.localizedDescription:
New Features
- Kids content now plays! A new Mobile Web playback source handles videos the fast source can't open, including kids content
- Smarter search: live suggestions as you type, plus recent searches under the search bar (swipe to delete)
- Auto playback source: picks the fastest source and silently falls back if a video fails to start
- Auto theme: follows system dark mode on iOS 13+, custom schedule on iOS 12
- Cleaner fullscreen: status bar hides during fullscreen playback (Settings toggle to keep it)

Bug Fixes
- Videos played by autoplay now correctly appear in your YouTube watch history
- Commenter avatars now load; anyone without one gets a colored monogram instead of an empty circle

1.4.1
- Auto playback source now applies after updating (previously stayed on Android VR if you'd ever opened the source picker)
- Added detailed logging around sign-in token refresh to diagnose the auto-logout issue (#12) — if it hits you, please use Settings → Share Debug Log

New Features
- Kids content now plays! The long-awaited one: a new Mobile Web playback source handles videos the fast source can't open, including kids content
- Smarter search: live suggestions as you type, plus recent searches under the search bar (swipe to delete)
- Auto playback source: picks the fastest source and silently falls back if a video fails to start
- Auto theme: follows system dark mode on iOS 13+, custom schedule on iOS 12
- Cleaner fullscreen: status bar hides during fullscreen playback (Settings toggle to keep it)

Bug Fixes
- Videos played by autoplay (e.g. while you sleep) now correctly appear in your YouTube watch history
- Commenter avatars now load; anyone without one gets a colored monogram instead of an empty circle

apps.localizedDescription: A lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+. No ads, no tracking. Features: SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, 1080p playback, background audio, PiP, subtitles, and more.
